message:
feat(core,parser,render,cli): add release evidence bundles, requirement styling, mindmap branch colors, and expanded CI quality gates

Evidence CLI (evidence.rs): add bundle/verify-bundle, verify-overrides, and
perf-report subcommands with SHA-256 integrity manifests, statistical benchmark
summarization (bootstrap CI), and release-gate emergency override validation.

Parser: generalize style/classDef extraction to all diagram types (not just
flowchart); add mindmap branch-color class assignment; parse requirement
relationship types (satisfies/contains/derives/refines/copies) with
differentiated arrow styles.

Render SVG: requirement nodes render risk-level fills (high/medium/low),
multi-line requirement metadata (type header, risk badge, verify method),
and journey score-based color fills.

Core: const-ify pure match functions, suppress clippy struct_excessive_bools
and collection_is_never_read lints, add RequirementMeta rendering support.

CI: add invariant-proof-guard, degradation-guard, release-gate-override-guard,
and statistical benchmark sampling (N runs with perf-report summarization)
to the quality-gate pipeline. Quality-gates.toml gains invariant_proof,
degradation, and release_gate_overrides sections.

Integration tests: 446 new lines covering evidence bundle round-trip,
override verification, perf-report, and expanded fixture setup.

Golden SVGs updated for requirement and mindmap rendering changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,15 +12,22 @@ blocking = true
 paths = ["crates/fm-layout/**", "crates/fm-core/**", "crates/fm-parser/**"]
 warn_threshold_pct = 5.0
 fail_threshold_pct = 10.0
+sample_count = 15
+baseline_path = ".ci/perf-baseline.json"
 allow_commit_tag_prefix = "[perf-regression-ok:"
-benchmark_command = "cargo test -p fm-layout benchmark -- --nocapture"
+benchmark_command = "cargo test -p fm-layout perf_baseline_ -- --nocapture"
 
 [property_test]
 enabled = true
 blocking = true
 cases = 10000

+[invariant_proof]
+enabled = true
+blocking = true
+command = "cargo test -p fm-cli --test invariant_proof_harness -- --nocapture"
+
 [evidence_ledger]
 enabled = true

@@ -39,3 +46,17 @@ command = "cargo test -p fm-cli --test golden_layout_test layout_golden_cases_ar
 enabled = true
 blocking = false

+
+[degradation]
+enabled = true
+blocking = true
+command = "cargo test -p fm-cli --test invariant_proof_harness deg_ -- --nocapture"
+
+[release_gate_overrides]
+enabled = true
+policy_id = "fm.release-gate.override@v1"
+allowed_approvers = ["Dicklesworthstone"]
+max_override_days = 14
+require_retro_bead = true
+require_fix_bead = true
+overrides_path = ".ci/release-gate-overrides.toml"

@@ -135,6 +149,35 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run property-heavy workspace tests
         run: cargo test --workspace --all-targets -- --nocapture
 
+  invariant-proof-guard:
+    name: Invariant Proof Guard
+    needs: quality-gate-config
+    if: needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.invariant_enabled == 'true'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Rust Toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - name: Cache Cargo Artifacts
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Run invariant proof harness
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p artifacts/evidence/slo
+          ${{ needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.invariant_command }} \
+            | tee artifacts/evidence/slo/invariant-proof.log
+
+      - name: Upload invariant proof artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: invariant-proof-log
+          path: artifacts/evidence/slo/invariant-proof.log
+          retention-days: 90
+

@@ -292,26 +335,151 @@ jobs:
       - name: Cache Cargo Artifacts
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
 
-      - name: Run benchmark evidence command
-        run: ${{ needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.benchmark_command }}
+      - name: Collect repeated benchmark samples
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p artifacts/evidence/perf
+          : > artifacts/evidence/perf/layout-benchmark.log
+          for run in $(seq 1 "${{ needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.benchmark_sample_count }}"); do
+            echo "# benchmark_run=${run}" | tee -a artifacts/evidence/perf/layout-benchmark.log
+            ${{ needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.benchmark_command }} \
+              | tee -a artifacts/evidence/perf/layout-benchmark.log
+          done
+
+      - name: Summarize statistical benchmark evidence
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          cargo run -p fm-cli --bin evidence -- --root . perf-report \
+            --input artifacts/evidence/perf/layout-benchmark.log \
+            --out-dir artifacts/evidence/perf \
+            --baseline "${{ needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.benchmark_baseline_path }}" \
+            --warn-threshold-pct "${{ needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.benchmark_warn_pct }}" \
+            --fail-threshold-pct "${{ needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.benchmark_fail_pct }}"
+
+      - name: Upload performance evidence artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: performance-benchmark-evidence
+          path: artifacts/evidence/perf
+          retention-days: 90
+
+  degradation-guard:
+    name: Degradation Guard
+    needs: quality-gate-config
+    if: needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.degradation_enabled == 'true'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Rust Toolchain

+
+      - name: Cache Cargo Artifacts

+
+      - name: Run degradation SLO harness

+        run: |
+          mkdir -p artifacts/evidence/slo

+      - name: Upload degradation artifact

+        with:
+          name: degradation-slo-log
+          path: artifacts/evidence/slo/degradation.log
+          retention-days: 90
 
   evidence-ledger-guard:
     name: Evidence Ledger Guard
     needs: quality-gate-config
     if: needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.evidence_enabled == 'true'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    continue-on-error: true
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
-      - name: Verify evidence corpus exists
+      - name: Setup Rust Toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - name: Cache Cargo Artifacts
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Capture SVG golden evidence log
         shell: bash
         run: |
-          test -d evidence
-          test -f evidence/TEMPLATE.md
-          test -d evidence/contracts
-          find evidence/contracts -maxdepth 1 -name '*.md' | grep -q .
+          mkdir -p artifacts/evidence/logs artifacts/evidence/proofs
+          cargo test -p fm-cli --test golden_svg_test svg_golden_snapshots_are_stable -- --nocapture \
+            | tee artifacts/evidence/logs/svg-golden.log
+
+      - name: Capture layout golden evidence log
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          cargo test -p fm-cli --test golden_layout_test -- --nocapture \
+            | tee artifacts/evidence/logs/layout-golden.log
+
+      - name: Capture determinism evidence log
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          ${{ needs.quality-gate-config.outputs.determinism_command }} \
+            | tee artifacts/evidence/logs/determinism.log
+
+      - name: Emit x86_64 determinism manifest
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          cargo run -p fm-cli -- determinism-manifest \
+            > artifacts/evidence/proofs/determinism-manifest-x86_64.json
+
+      - name: Refresh ledger report with bead coverage
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          cargo run -p fm-cli --bin evidence -- --root . report --check-beads --fail-on-missing-beads
+
+      - name: Build release evidence bundle
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          bundle_dir="$(
+            cargo run -p fm-cli --bin evidence -- --root . bundle \
+              --out-dir artifacts/release-evidence \
+              --release-ref "${GITHUB_REF_NAME:-${GITHUB_SHA}}" \
+              --retention-days 90 \
+              --artifact artifacts/evidence/logs/svg-golden.log \
+              --artifact artifacts/evidence/logs/layout-golden.log \
+              --artifact artifacts/evidence/logs/determinism.log \
+              --artifact artifacts/evidence/proofs/determinism-manifest-x86_64.json
+          )"
+          echo "bundle_dir=$bundle_dir" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
+          echo "bundle_name=$(basename "$bundle_dir")" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
+
+      - name: Verify release evidence bundle integrity
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          cargo run -p fm-cli --bin evidence -- --root . verify-bundle \
+            --manifest "${bundle_dir}/manifest.json" \
+            --require-kind ledger-report \
+            --require-kind ledger-entry \
+            --require-kind decision-contract \
+            --require-kind ci-artifact
+
+      - name: Publish release evidence bundle
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ${{ env.bundle_name }}
+          path: ${{ env.bundle_dir }}
+          retention-days: 90
+
+      - name: Summarize release evidence bundle
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          {
+            echo "### Evidence Bundle"
+            echo ""
+            echo "- Artifact path: \`${bundle_dir}\`"
+            echo "- Retention: \`90 days\`"
+            echo "- Manifest: \`${bundle_dir}/manifest.json\`"
+          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
 
   decision-contract-guard:
     name: Decision Contract Guard

           find evidence/contracts -maxdepth 1 -name '*.md' | grep -q .
 
+  release-gate-override-guard:
+    name: Release Gate Override Guard

+      - name: Setup Rust Toolchain

+      - name: Upload override summary artifact

+
   quality-summary:
     name: Quality Summary
     needs:
       - quality-gate-config
       - core-check
       - golden-checksum-guard
       - property-test-guard
+      - invariant-proof-guard
       - determinism-guard
       - cross-platform-determinism-native
       - cross-platform-determinism-wasm
       - cross-platform-determinism-compare
       - performance-regression-guard
+      - degradation-guard
       - evidence-ledger-guard
       - decision-contract-guard
+      - release-gate-override-guard
       - wasm-build
       - coverage
     if: always()
@@ -358,37 +558,134 @@ jobs:
             echo "| core-check | ${{ needs.core-check.result }} |"
             echo "| golden-checksum-guard | ${{ needs.golden-checksum-guard.result }} |"
             echo "| property-test-guard | ${{ needs.property-test-guard.result }} |"
+            echo "| invariant-proof-guard | ${{ needs.invariant-proof-guard.result }} |"
             echo "| determinism-guard | ${{ needs.determinism-guard.result }} |"
             echo "| cross-platform-determinism-native | ${{ needs.cross-platform-determinism-native.result }} |"
             echo "| cross-platform-determinism-wasm | ${{ needs.cross-platform-determinism-wasm.result }} |"
             echo "| cross-platform-determinism-compare | ${{ needs.cross-platform-determinism-compare.result }} |"
             echo "| performance-regression-guard | ${{ needs.performance-regression-guard.result }} |"
+            echo "| degradation-guard | ${{ needs.degradation-guard.result }} |"
             echo "| evidence-ledger-guard | ${{ needs.evidence-ledger-guard.result }} |"
             echo "| decision-contract-guard | ${{ needs.decision-contract-guard.result }} |"
+            echo "| release-gate-override-guard | ${{ needs.release-gate-override-guard.result }} |"
             echo "| wasm-build | ${{ needs.wasm-build.result }} |"
             echo "| coverage | ${{ needs.coverage.result }} |"
           } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
 
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Rust Toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - name: Cache Cargo Artifacts
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Generate release SLO summary
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          python3 - <<'PY'
+          import json
+          from pathlib import Path
+          import subprocess
+
+          results = {
+              "core-check": "${{ needs.core-check.result }}",
+              "golden-checksum-guard": "${{ needs.golden-checksum-guard.result }}",
+              "property-test-guard": "${{ needs.property-test-guard.result }}",
+              "invariant-proof-guard": "${{ needs.invariant-proof-guard.result }}",
+              "determinism-guard": "${{ needs.determinism-guard.result }}",
+              "cross-platform-determinism-native": "${{ needs.cross-platform-determinism-native.result }}",
+              "cross-platform-determinism-wasm": "${{ needs.cross-platform-determinism-wasm.result }}",
+              "cross-platform-determinism-compare": "${{ needs.cross-platform-determinism-compare.result }}",
+              "performance-regression-guard": "${{ needs.performance-regression-guard.result }}",
+              "degradation-guard": "${{ needs.degradation-guard.result }}",
+              "release-gate-override-guard": "${{ needs.release-gate-override-guard.result }}",
+              "wasm-build": "${{ needs.wasm-build.result }}",
+              "coverage": "${{ needs.coverage.result }}",
+          }
+          summary = json.loads(
+              subprocess.check_output(
+                  [
+                      "cargo",
+                      "run",
+                      "-p",
+                      "fm-cli",
+                      "--bin",
+                      "evidence",
+                      "--",
+                      "--root",
+                      ".",
+                      "verify-overrides",
+                  ],
+                  text=True,
+              )
+          )
+          active_gates = set(summary["active_gates"])
+          overridden = []
+          failures = []
+          passed = []
+          for gate, result in results.items():
+              if result == "success":
+                  passed.append(gate)
+                  continue
+              if gate in active_gates:
+                  overridden.append(gate)
+              else:
+                  failures.append(gate)
+
+          slo_summary = {
+              "policy_id": summary["policy_id"],
+              "active_override_gates": sorted(active_gates),
+              "passed_gates": passed,
+              "overridden_failing_gates": overridden,
+              "uncovered_failing_gates": failures,
+              "release_blocking_pass": len(failures) == 0,
+              "gate_results": results,
+              "threshold_notes": [
+                  "All blocking quality gates must report success unless a valid active override explicitly scopes the failing gate.",
+                  "Invariant proof guard supplies correctness evidence.",
+                  "Determinism guards supply repeated-run and cross-platform drift evidence.",
+                  "Performance regression guard supplies benchmark budget evidence.",
+                  "Degradation guard supplies pressure-tier graceful-degradation evidence.",
+              ],
+          }
+          out_dir = Path("artifacts/evidence/slo")
+          out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+          out_path = out_dir / "release-slo-summary.json"
+          out_path.write_text(json.dumps(slo_summary, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
+          print(json.dumps(slo_summary, indent=2))
+          PY
+
+      - name: Upload release SLO summary artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: release-slo-summary
+          path: artifacts/evidence/slo/release-slo-summary.json
+          retention-days: 90
+
       - name: Enforce blocking gate status
         shell: bash
         run: |
-          failures=0
-          for result in \
-            "${{ needs.core-check.result }}" \
-            "${{ needs.golden-checksum-guard.result }}" \
-            "${{ needs.property-test-guard.result }}" \
-            "${{ needs.determinism-guard.result }}" \
-            "${{ needs.cross-platform-determinism-native.result }}" \
-            "${{ needs.cross-platform-determinism-wasm.result }}" \
-            "${{ needs.cross-platform-determinism-compare.result }}" \
-            "${{ needs.performance-regression-guard.result }}" \
-            "${{ needs.wasm-build.result }}" \
-            "${{ needs.coverage.result }}"; do
-            if [ "$result" != "success" ]; then
-              failures=1
-            fi
-          done
-          exit "$failures"
+          python3 - <<'PY'
+          import json
+          import sys
+          from pathlib import Path
+
+          summary = json.loads(
+              Path("artifacts/evidence/slo/release-slo-summary.json").read_text()
+          )
+          print("Active override gates:", summary["active_override_gates"])
+          if summary["overridden_failing_gates"]:
+              print("Overridden failing gates:", summary["overridden_failing_gates"])
+          if summary["uncovered_failing_gates"]:
+              print(
+                  "Blocking gate failures without valid override:",
+                  summary["uncovered_failing_gates"],
+                  file=sys.stderr,
+              )
+              raise SystemExit(1)
+          PY

     name: WASM Build

@@ -523,7 +523,74 @@ fn run_evidence(args: &[&str]) -> std::process::Output {
 fn write_evidence_root_fixture() -> TempDir {
     let temp = TempDir::new().expect("temp evidence root");
     std::fs::create_dir_all(temp.path().join("evidence/ledger")).expect("create ledger dir");
+    std::fs::create_dir_all(temp.path().join("evidence/contracts")).expect("create contracts dir");
     std::fs::create_dir_all(temp.path().join(".beads")).expect("create beads dir");

+#[test]
+fn evidence_bundle_creates_manifest_and_copies_required_files() {
+    let temp = write_evidence_root_fixture();
+    let root = temp.path().to_str().expect("root path utf-8");
+
+    let add_output = run_evidence(&["--root", root, "add", "egraph-crossing-min"]);
+    assert!(
+        add_output.status.success(),
+        "{}",
+        String::from_utf8_lossy(&add_output.stderr)
+    );
+
+    let extra_artifact_dir = temp.path().join("artifacts/evidence/logs");
+    std::fs::create_dir_all(&extra_artifact_dir).expect("create artifact dir");
+    std::fs::write(
+        extra_artifact_dir.join("golden-svg.log"),
+        "{\"surface\":\"svg\"}\n",
+    )
+    .expect("write ci artifact");
+
+    let output = run_evidence(&[
+        "--root",
+        root,
+        "bundle",
+        "--out-dir",
+        "bundles",
+        "--bundle-version",
+        "1.2.3",
+        "--release-ref",
+        "release-42",
+        "--artifact",
+        "artifacts/evidence/logs/golden-svg.log",
+    ]);
+    assert!(
+        output.status.success(),
+        "evidence bundle failed: {}",
+        String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stderr)
+    );
+
+    let bundle_dir = String::from_utf8(output.stdout)
+        .expect("bundle stdout utf-8")
+        .trim()
+        .to_string();
+    assert!(bundle_dir.ends_with("frankenmermaid-evidence-v1-2-3-release-42"));
+
+    let manifest_path = temp.path().join(&bundle_dir).join("manifest.json");
+    let manifest_raw = std::fs::read_to_string(&manifest_path).expect("read manifest");
+    let manifest: serde_json::Value = serde_json::from_str(&manifest_raw).expect("manifest json");
+    assert_eq!(manifest["bundle_version"], "1.2.3");
+    assert_eq!(manifest["release_ref"], "release-42");
+    assert_eq!(manifest["retention_days"], 90);
+    assert!(
+        manifest["summary"]["ci_artifact_count"]
+            .as_u64()
+            .expect("ci artifact count")
+            >= 1
+    );
+
+    let readme_path = temp.path().join(&bundle_dir).join("README.md");
+    let readme = std::fs::read_to_string(&readme_path).expect("read bundle readme");
+    assert!(readme.contains("files/evidence/ledger/README.md"));
+
+    let copied_artifact = temp
+        .path()
+        .join(&bundle_dir)
+        .join("files/artifacts/evidence/logs/golden-svg.log");
+    assert!(copied_artifact.exists(), "copied CI artifact should exist");
+}

+#[test]
+fn evidence_verify_bundle_detects_tampering() {
+    let temp = write_evidence_root_fixture();
+    let root = temp.path().to_str().expect("root path utf-8");
+
+    let add_output = run_evidence(&["--root", root, "add", "egraph-crossing-min"]);
+    assert!(
+        add_output.status.success(),
+        "{}",
+        String::from_utf8_lossy(&add_output.stderr)
+    );
+
+    let extra_artifact_dir = temp.path().join("artifacts/evidence/logs");
+    std::fs::create_dir_all(&extra_artifact_dir).expect("create artifact dir");
+    std::fs::write(
+        extra_artifact_dir.join("golden-layout.log"),
+        "{\"surface\":\"layout\"}\n",
+    )
+    .expect("write ci artifact");
+
+    let bundle_output = run_evidence(&[
+        "--root",
+        root,
+        "bundle",
+        "--out-dir",
+        "bundles",
+        "--release-ref",
+        "verify-me",
+        "--artifact",
+        "artifacts/evidence/logs/golden-layout.log",
+    ]);
+    assert!(
+        bundle_output.status.success(),
+        "{}",
+        String::from_utf8_lossy(&bundle_output.stderr)
+    );
+
+    let bundle_dir = String::from_utf8(bundle_output.stdout)
+        .expect("bundle stdout utf-8")
+        .trim()
+        .to_string();
+    let copied_artifact = temp
+        .path()
+        .join(&bundle_dir)
+        .join("files/artifacts/evidence/logs/golden-layout.log");
+    std::fs::write(&copied_artifact, "{\"surface\":\"tampered\"}\n").expect("tamper artifact");
+
+    let verify_output = run_evidence(&[
+        "--root",
+        root,
+        "verify-bundle",
+        "--manifest",
+        &format!("{bundle_dir}/manifest.json"),
+        "--require-kind",
+        "ci-artifact",
+        "--require-kind",
+        "decision-contract",
+    ]);
+    assert!(
+        !verify_output.status.success(),
+        "verify-bundle should fail after tampering"
+    );
+    let stderr = String::from_utf8_lossy(&verify_output.stderr);
+    assert!(stderr.contains("sha256 mismatch"));
+}

+#[test]
+fn evidence_perf_report_writes_summary_and_supporting_artifacts() {
+    let temp = write_evidence_root_fixture();
+    let root = temp.path().to_str().expect("root path utf-8");
+
+    std::fs::write(
+        temp.path().join(".ci/perf-baseline.json"),
+        r#"{
+  "schema_version": 1,
+  "benchmarks": {
+    "sugiyama_small": { "p99_ns": 20000000 },
+    "comparison_50.sugiyama": { "p99_ns": 70000000 }
+  }
+}
+"#,
+    )
+    .expect("write perf baseline");
+    std::fs::write(
+        temp.path().join("perf.log"),
+        concat!(
+            "{\"benchmark\":\"sugiyama_small\",\"nodes\":20,\"edges\":38,\"ns\":10000000}\n",
+            "{\"benchmark\":\"sugiyama_small\",\"nodes\":20,\"edges\":38,\"ns\":12000000}\n",
+            "{\"benchmark\":\"sugiyama_small\",\"nodes\":20,\"edges\":38,\"ns\":11000000}\n",
+            "{\"benchmark\":\"comparison_50\",\"sugiyama_ns\":50000000,\"force_ns\":30000000,\"tree_ns\":10000000}\n",
+            "{\"benchmark\":\"comparison_50\",\"sugiyama_ns\":52000000,\"force_ns\":31000000,\"tree_ns\":9000000}\n"
+        ),
+    )
+    .expect("write perf log");
+
+    let output = run_evidence(&[
+        "--root",
+        root,
+        "perf-report",
+        "--input",
+        "perf.log",
+        "--out-dir",
+        "artifacts/evidence/perf",
+        "--baseline",
+        ".ci/perf-baseline.json",
+        "--warn-threshold-pct",
+        "5",
+        "--fail-threshold-pct",
+        "10",
+    ]);
+    assert!(
+        output.status.success(),
+        "perf-report failed: {}",
+        String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stderr)
+    );
+
+    let summary: serde_json::Value = serde_json::from_slice(&output.stdout).expect("summary json");
+    assert_eq!(summary["schema_version"], 1);
+    assert_eq!(summary["benchmark_count"], 4);
+    assert_eq!(summary["release_blocking_pass"], true);
+
+    let summary_path = temp.path().join("artifacts/evidence/perf/summary.json");
+    let env_path = temp.path().join("artifacts/evidence/perf/env.json");
+    let corpus_path = temp
+        .path()
+        .join("artifacts/evidence/perf/corpus_manifest.json");
+    assert!(summary_path.exists(), "summary artifact should exist");
+    assert!(env_path.exists(), "env fingerprint should exist");
+    assert!(corpus_path.exists(), "corpus manifest should exist");
+
+    let summary_file: serde_json::Value = serde_json::from_str(
+        &std::fs::read_to_string(summary_path).expect("read summary artifact"),
+    )
+    .expect("parse summary artifact");
+    assert_eq!(
+        summary_file["benchmarks"]
+            .as_array()
+            .expect("benchmarks")
+            .len(),
+        4
+    );
+}

+#[test]
+fn evidence_perf_report_fails_on_tail_regression() {
+    let temp = write_evidence_root_fixture();
+    let root = temp.path().to_str().expect("root path utf-8");
+
+    std::fs::write(
+        temp.path().join(".ci/perf-baseline.json"),
+        r#"{
+  "schema_version": 1,
+  "benchmarks": {
+    "sugiyama_small": { "p99_ns": 10000000 }
+  }
+}
+"#,
+    )
+    .expect("write perf baseline");
+    std::fs::write(
+        temp.path().join("perf.log"),
+        concat!(
+            "{\"benchmark\":\"sugiyama_small\",\"nodes\":20,\"edges\":38,\"ns\":20000000}\n",
+            "{\"benchmark\":\"sugiyama_small\",\"nodes\":20,\"edges\":38,\"ns\":22000000}\n",
+            "{\"benchmark\":\"sugiyama_small\",\"nodes\":20,\"edges\":38,\"ns\":24000000}\n"
+        ),
+    )
+    .expect("write perf log");
+
+    let output = run_evidence(&[
+        "--root",
+        root,
+        "perf-report",
+        "--input",
+        "perf.log",
+        "--out-dir",
+        "artifacts/evidence/perf",
+        "--baseline",
+        ".ci/perf-baseline.json",
+        "--warn-threshold-pct",
+        "5",
+        "--fail-threshold-pct",
+        "10",
+    ]);
+    assert!(
+        !output.status.success(),
+        "perf-report should fail when p99 regression exceeds threshold"
+    );
+    let stderr = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stderr);
+    assert!(stderr.contains("performance regression exceeded fail threshold"));
+}

+#[test]
+fn evidence_verify_overrides_accepts_authorized_active_override() {
+    let temp = write_evidence_root_fixture();
+    let root = temp.path().to_str().expect("root path utf-8");
+
+    std::fs::write(
+        temp.path().join(".ci/release-gate-overrides.toml"),
+        concat!(
+            "schema_version = 1\n\n",
+            "[[overrides]]\n",
+            "id = \"ovr-001\"\n",
+            "approver = \"Dicklesworthstone\"\n",
+            "created_by = \"BlackShore\"\n",
+            "created_at = \"2026-03-31T10:00:00Z\"\n",
+            "reason = \"Emergency release needed while determinism compare is flaky.\"\n",
+            "scope = [\"cross-platform-determinism-compare\", \"coverage\"]\n",
+            "expires_at = \"2026-04-02T10:00:00Z\"\n",
+            "retro_bead = \"bd-retro.1\"\n",
+            "fix_bead = \"bd-fix.1\"\n",
+        ),
+    )
+    .expect("write override ledger");
+
+    let output = Command::new(env!("CARGO_BIN_EXE_evidence"))
+        .env("EVIDENCE_OVERRIDE_NOW", "2026-03-31T12:00:00Z")
+        .args(["--root", root, "verify-overrides"])
+        .output()
+        .expect("run verify-overrides");
+    assert!(
+        output.status.success(),
+        "verify-overrides failed: {}",
+        String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stderr)
+    );
+    let stdout = String::from_utf8(output.stdout).expect("stdout utf-8");
+    let json: serde_json::Value = serde_json::from_str(&stdout).expect("summary json");
+    assert_eq!(json["policy_id"], "fm.release-gate.override@v1");
+    assert_eq!(json["active_override_count"], 1);
+    assert!(
+        json["active_gates"]
+            .as_array()
+            .expect("active gates array")
+            .iter()
+            .any(|value| value == "cross-platform-determinism-compare")
+    );
+}
